pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 17 if source/target remain at 8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the java.version property to 17 to reflect the new baseline JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build tools relying on this property may fail to compile or run correctly on JDK 17 if set to 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.4.2 to 3.3.13 to support Java 17 and modern Spring features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks Jakarta EE namespace support required by Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito version to 5.23.1-SNAPSHOT to ensure compatibility with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions may have runtime issues or lack support for newer Java features/bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit JUnit 4 dependency, likely in favor of JUnit 5 provided by Spring Boot 3 starter.
